condition_cn: 条件：90分钟常规时间打平；输入包括完整90分钟预测、平局比分分布、淘汰赛证据、常规时间Tail与MAS结论。

points.rationale_cn: 加时阶段时间短且淘汰赛风险偏好下降，仍平是基础高概率分支。
points.rationale_en: Extra time is short and knockout risk appetite usually drops, so another draw remains the baseline high-probability branch.

points.tail_title_cn: 加时偷袭 / 一球决胜
points.rationale_cn: 葡萄牙凭借体能、替补或压迫优势在加时净胜一球。
points.rationale_en: Evidence-based explanation generated from the match forecast.

points.tail_title_cn: 加时偷袭 / 一球决胜
points.rationale_cn: 克罗地亚凭借体能、替补或反击效率在加时净胜一球。
points.rationale_en: Evidence-based explanation generated from the match forecast.

points.tail_title_cn: 加时开放 / 双方进球
points.rationale_cn: 加时阶段比赛打开，双方各有一次有效转化。
points.tail_title_en: Open extra time / both teams score
points.rationale_en: The game opens up in extra time, with both sides converting one effective chance.

points.tail_title_cn: 体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
points.rationale_cn: 葡萄牙在对手体能或心理崩盘后拉开比分。
points.rationale_en: Evidence-based explanation generated from the match forecast.

points.tail_title_cn: 体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
points.rationale_cn: 克罗地亚在对手压上后连续制造转换机会。
points.rationale_en: Evidence-based explanation generated from the match forecast.

points.tail_title_cn: 加时开放 / 双方进球，体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
points.rationale_cn: 加时阶段体能崩溃或开放对攻形成的低频高偏离路径。
points.tail_title_en: Open extra time / both teams score, Fatigue collapse / extra-time breakthrough
points.rationale_en: A low-frequency tail path where fatigue or open extra-time play creates a wider scoring swing.

points.tail_title_cn: 体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
points.rationale_cn: 加时阶段体能崩溃或开放对攻形成的低频高偏离路径。
points.rationale_en: A low-frequency tail path where fatigue or open extra-time play creates a wider scoring swing.

points.tail_title_cn: 加时开放 / 双方进球
points.rationale_cn: 加时阶段体能崩溃或开放对攻形成的低频高偏离路径。
points.tail_title_en: Open extra time / both teams score
points.rationale_en: A low-frequency tail path where fatigue or open extra-time play creates a wider scoring swing.

points.tail_title_cn: 加时开放 / 双方进球
points.rationale_cn: 双方加时互有进球但仍未分胜负的补充覆盖路径。
points.tail_title_en: Open extra time / both teams score
points.rationale_en: A supplementary extra-time path where both teams score but the match remains level.

points.rationale_cn: 由统一淘汰赛路径分布派生。
points.rationale_en: Derived from the unified knockout path distribution.

points.rationale_cn: 加时阶段体能崩溃或开放对攻形成的低频高偏离路径。
points.rationale_en: A low-frequency tail path where fatigue or open extra-time play creates a wider scoring swing.

points.rationale_cn: 加时阶段体能崩溃或开放对攻形成的低频高偏离路径。
points.rationale_en: A low-frequency tail path where fatigue or open extra-time play creates a wider scoring swing.

tail_focus.label: 加时偷袭 / 一球决胜
tail_focus.label_cn: 加时偷袭 / 一球决胜
tail_focus.definition_cn: 加时30分钟内通过反击、定位球或替补冲击形成1球胜负。
tail_focus.rationale_cn: 葡萄牙凭借体能、替补或压迫优势在加时净胜一球。
tail_focus.definition_en: A one-goal extra-time decider created through counters, set pieces or substitute impact.
tail_focus.rationale_en: Evidence-based explanation generated from the match forecast.

tail_focus.label: 加时开放 / 双方进球
tail_focus.label_cn: 加时开放 / 双方进球
tail_focus.definition_cn: 加时阶段双方均有进球，比赛从谨慎拖入开放对攻。
tail_focus.rationale_cn: 加时阶段比赛打开，双方各有一次有效转化。
tail_focus.label_en: Open extra time / both teams score
tail_focus.definition_en: Both sides score in extra time as a cautious game turns into an open exchange.
tail_focus.rationale_en: The game opens up in extra time, with both sides converting one effective chance.

tail_focus.label: 体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
tail_focus.label_cn: 体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
tail_focus.definition_cn: 加时净胜至少2球，或总进球达到3球以上的一方打穿路径。
tail_focus.rationale_cn: 葡萄牙在对手体能或心理崩盘后拉开比分。
tail_focus.definition_en: A team wins extra time by at least two goals, or the period reaches three or more goals through a breakaway path.
tail_focus.rationale_en: Evidence-based explanation generated from the match forecast.

key_factors.impact_cn: 葡萄牙对克罗地亚的平局入口较高，1-1和0-0是主要加时来源；加时不会重新打开为完全独立比赛。
key_factors.label_en: Extra time comes from 1-1 and 0-0 branches
key_factors.impact_en: Portugal-Croatia has a relatively high draw entry, with 1-1 and 0-0 as the main paths into extra time; the period should not be treated as a standalone match.
key_factors.text_cn: 葡萄牙对克罗地亚的平局入口较高，1-1和0-0是主要加时来源；加时不会重新打开为完全独立比赛。
key_factors.text_en: Portugal-Croatia has a relatively high draw entry, with 1-1 and 0-0 as the main paths into extra time; the period should not be treated as a standalone match.

key_factors.impact_cn: 葡萄牙的Vitinha、João Neves、Bruno Fernandes与克罗地亚的Modrić、Baturina、Sučić之间的中场对抗，会决定加时是否继续低节奏。
key_factors.impact_en: The midfield battle between Portugal's Vitinha, João Neves and Bruno Fernandes and Croatia's Modrić, Baturina and Sučić will decide whether extra time remains low-tempo.
key_factors.text_cn: 葡萄牙的Vitinha、João Neves、Bruno Fernandes与克罗地亚的Modrić、Baturina、Sučić之间的中场对抗，会决定加时是否继续低节奏。
key_factors.text_en: The midfield battle between Portugal's Vitinha, João Neves and Bruno Fernandes and Croatia's Modrić, Baturina and Sučić will decide whether extra time remains low-tempo.

key_factors.label_cn: 葡萄牙边路与禁区接应
key_factors.impact_cn: 若葡萄牙边路持续形成1v1或2v1，并让禁区内有多点接应，加时阶段更可能出现1-0或2-0解决路径。
key_factors.impact_en: If Portugal keep creating wide 1v1 or 2v1 situations with multiple box targets, extra time is more likely to produce a 1-0 or 2-0 Portugal path.
key_factors.text_cn: 若葡萄牙边路持续形成1v1或2v1，并让禁区内有多点接应，加时阶段更可能出现1-0或2-0解决路径。
key_factors.text_en: If Portugal keep creating wide 1v1 or 2v1 situations with multiple box targets, extra time is more likely to produce a 1-0 or 2-0 Portugal path.

key_factors.label_cn: 克罗地亚拖长比赛能力
key_factors.impact_cn: 克罗地亚更有经验把比赛拖入低节奏、少失误的结构中；若70分钟后仍平，加时拖入点球的权重会上升。
key_factors.label_en: Croatia's ability to extend the match
key_factors.impact_en: Croatia have the experience to slow the game into a low-error structure; if it remains level late, the weight of a penalty-drag path increases.
key_factors.text_cn: 克罗地亚更有经验把比赛拖入低节奏、少失误的结构中；若70分钟后仍平，加时拖入点球的权重会上升。
key_factors.text_en: Croatia have the experience to slow the game into a low-error structure; if it remains level late, the weight of a penalty-drag path increases.

key_factors.label_cn: 晚场天气与定位球变量
key_factors.impact_cn: 多伦多晚场若出现降雨，后段会更依赖定位球、二点球和纪律控制，开放比分与偷袭分支都会被放大。
key_factors.impact_en: If rain affects the late Toronto game, set pieces, second balls and discipline become more important, increasing both open-score and steal branches.
key_factors.text_cn: 多伦多晚场若出现降雨，后段会更依赖定位球、二点球和纪律控制，开放比分与偷袭分支都会被放大。
key_factors.text_en: If rain affects the late Toronto game, set pieces, second balls and discipline become more important, increasing both open-score and steal branches.

condition_en: Condition: the match is level after 90 minutes; inputs include the full 90-minute prediction, draw score distribution, knockout evidence, normal-time tail scenarios and MAS conclusions.
